segments.text: Samus at this percent as always
segments.original_text: パーセントやはりサムスといえば

segments.text: the setup's there, but Greninja grabbed
segments.original_text: 匂い展開だが掴んでいるのは

segments.text: with nair, clean knockdown was in sight
segments.original_text: ゲッコウガ先 空Nで落としが見えたが
中途半端落としになってしまった

full_text: Samus at this percent as always up throw's a KO the setup's there, but Greninja grabbed with nair, clean knockdown was in sight but it ended up awkward

corrections.original: 月光河川空中へ落とし
corrections.corrected: ゲッコウガ先 空Nで落とし
corrections.rule: kanji homophone: 月光河川→ゲッコウガ先, 空中へ→空Nで
